title: JosephOIbrahim/Synapse
summary: AI copilot inside Houdini — plain English becomes real nodes; every action undo-safe, recorded, consent-gated (receipts, not magic). A self-improving flywheel grounds it in probe-verified Houdini truth — validates before it builds. Five engines (Claude · Gemini · Nemotron · Ollama · Custom), 115 tools. H21 today, H22-ready.

title: AronMav/opex

Без vendor-lock.
